import nl.tsym.tackbox.report.Report;

// Tier-1 positive (DECISIONS D004): error/warn/panic on the tackbox runtime
// capture helper are recognized by origin (package nl.tsym.tackbox.report, class
// Report). A catch reaching one, with the caught flowing in, is credited - no
// `// no-report:` marker and no `.tackbox/reporters` entry. Both the imported
// spelling and the fully-qualified static spelling resolve to the same origin.
class ReportCapture {
    void errorViaImport() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            Report.error("boom", e, null, "area.key");
        }
    }

    void warnViaImport() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            Report.warn("transient", e, null, "area.key");
        }
    }

    void panicViaImport() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            Report.panic("worker", e);
        }
    }

    void errorViaFullyQualified() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            nl.tsym.tackbox.report.Report.error("boom", e, null, "area.key");
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
